meaning: 仙台[日本本州岛东北岸港市]
examples: The last giant tsunami recorded in Sendai struck in 869.
MODIS detected a fire burning near the shore north of Sendai.
But some clues suggested that the Sendai region might be capable of greater violence.
The heaviest damage was in Sendai City, where about 100 Seven Elevens were damaged.
Greg Timberlake, forward commander of the III Marine Expeditionary Force at Camp Sendai in northern Japan, said.
